assertions.description: The PCB has vias with 0.05 mm annular ring (drill 0.3 mm, pad 0.4 mm). The analyzer correctly identifies this as below the advanced process minimum of 0.1 mm, assigns dfm_tier='challenging', and reports one violation. Board dimensions (41.7 x 32.2 mm), 28 footprints, 183 track segments, 63 vias, and 2-layer stackup are all accurately reported.
